name: secretkeeper
description: Stops AI agents from leaking secrets. Prompt rules + deterministic scanner for API keys, credentials, JWT secrets, and more.

interface.shortDescription: Stop credential leaks before they ship
interface.longDescription: Prevents AI agents from hardcoding API keys, passwords, JWT secrets, and private keys. Combines prompt rules with a deterministic regex+entropy scanner.
defaultPrompt: Scan this diff for leaked secrets.
Replace hardcoded credentials with environment variables.
Audit the repo for exposed API keys.
